# You almost donated ☕

No hard feelings. This page exists precisely for this moment.

Nothing changes on your side: TruePin stays free, with no ads and no
tracking. In fact, canceling the donation has unlocked our most exclusive
tier - **Free Forever** - which includes every feature, every update, and
the undivided attention of our QA department (one toy poodle, very thorough).

---

> ## 📜 Certificate of Almost-Donation
>
> This certifies that the bearer came *remarkably* close to supporting
> TruePin, and is hereby awarded the complete product experience - which,
> coincidentally, is exactly what everyone gets. That's the whole point.
>
> — Michael, developer
>
> — Lucky 🐩, head of QA *(paw print pending)*

---

## The $0 ways to help are genuinely valuable

- ⭐ **[Star the repo](https://github.com/datysho/truepin)** - two clicks, helps other people find TruePin
- 📝 **[Rate it on the Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/truepin/fkgkfmhkdgpeopigpbgohoblocpjakcf/reviews)** - reviews are how extensions get discovered
- 🐛 **[Report a bug](https://github.com/datysho/truepin/issues)** - a good bug report is worth more than coffee

And the donation? It was going toward coffee, treats for Lucky, and server
costs (there are no servers). So really, nothing was lost.

If you ever change your mind, the donate button will be right where you
left it. Lucky remains cautiously optimistic.
